overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a vast candle-lit great hall with gothic architecture, floating candles, and long dining tables. Robed figures walk through the foreground while the camera remains stationary, capturing the warm ambient lighting and detailed stone interior reminiscent of a magical school dining hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

events.description: third robed figure enters frame from right side and walks toward center
robed figure enters from left foreground and walks across the scene

agents.ego_description: standing stationary near the entrance observing the great hall and the people within it

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking from left to right across the foreground
robed figure entering from right and moving toward the center tables

entered.detail: thousands of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
rows of long wooden tables with benches arranged parallel to each other
tall gothic stained glass windows showing blue twilight sky outside
large stone fireplace with warm fire glowing at the far end of the hall
upper level balcony with stone railings above the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady cinematic view of a vast gothic great hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Long dining tables stretch into the distance while robed figures walk through the foreground. The warm candlelight contrasts with the blue twilight visible through tall stained glass windows on the right, and a large fireplace glows at the far end beneath an upper balcony.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a vast gothic great hall where warm interior light contrasts with the cool tones of a twilight exterior. It begins by capturing the immense scale of the room, illuminated by thousands of floating candles that cast a golden glow over long dining tables stretching into the distance. As robed figures drift through the foreground, the camera emphasizes the depth of the space, drawing the eye toward the blue light filtering through tall stained glass windows on the right. The scene then expands toward the far end of the hall, where a large fireplace glows beneath an upper balcony, anchoring the atmospheric composition of the magical interior.
